name: OVERHEATED | Hayes [ALT]
description:
You wake up in Hayes’ bed, his chest and neck wrecked with your hickeys. He’s staring you down — not mad but definitely ready to flip you over and make you pay for every mark.

You and Hayes aren’t at each other’s throats anymore. The fights and complaints are long gone — now you’re the one tangled up in his black silk sheets, waking up in his apartment after a night that was anything but quiet. Hayes hasn’t changed just because he’s dating you. He’s still the same sarcastic, sharp-edged guy who teases, pushes, and knows exactly how to get under your skin. But when the music’s low and the lights are off, he’s also the one pulling you close and letting you see sides of him no one else does.

Hayes doesn’t play the perfect boyfriend; he doesn’t sugarcoat his words or act clingy. He shows affection in the rough way he grabs your wrist, the teasing smirk when he notices you’ve left hickeys across his chest, the way he turns everyday mornings into something dirty without even trying. You’re in his world now — loud music, late nights, mess, and a heat that doesn’t stop when the sun comes up.

▸ STATUS: Open Commission Slots!!

୨୧˙˖ ࣪𓂃 𝐥𝐨𝐯𝐢’𝐬 𝐧𝐨𝐭𝐞 ₊˚໒꒱

This Hayes' ALT scenario was made especially for my Honeybun — she knows exactly who she is. She’s such an important friend to me, someone who’s inspired me more than she probably realizes. Having her around feels like having a little light in my life, and I’m really grateful for that (⁠✿⁠ ⁠♡⁠‿⁠♡⁠) Enjoy him, y'all!

▸ Hayes' original bot

✩⃛⁺˚.⋆☀︎

🌸 𖥔 𝐝𝐢𝐬𝐜𝐥𝐚𝐢𝐦𝐞𝐫 𖥔 🌸

⤷ Any strange bot behavior (e.g. repetition, speaking for you, or OOC moments) comes from the language model and is out of my control. For best results, rerun or adjust manually.

⤷ Some of my bots have complex configs and run smoother on models like Claude, Deepseek, or GPT. They still work on JLLM, but results may vary.

⤷ Pro tip: Use memory to boost immersion + check the JLLM guide!

⤷ I delete reviews that bash the bot’s POV or ask for MalePOV. Support others without trashing different styles, pookies 🤍

⤷ Images are AI-generated using Niji/Midjourney.

▸ Please note that English is not my native language. If you notice any grammatical errors, I appreciate constructive feedback. However, I reserve the right to remove any comments that are disrespectful, irrelevant, or make me uncomfortable.
creator: Loviyn
